tips_headlines.text: The Weenie Wars community was thrown into absolute chaos this morning after the anonymous release of the so-called “Epween Files,” a dossier alleging that current leader Tom, who sits atop the standings with 24 officially logged weenies, may have reached that total through methods the official rulebook describes as “deeply concerning and anatomically impossible.” Sources familiar with the investigation claim that as many as 85% of Tom’s recorded weenies never passed his lips at all, instead allegedly taking the “rear entrance express lane.” Officials confirmed that only weenies consumed orally are eligible to be logged, prompting an immediate review of Tom’s scorecard. Eyewitnesses reported seeing Tom “walking suspiciously stiff” after several meals, while one judge admitted, “At the time, we just thought he had bad posture. Looking back… there were signs.”  The allegations have sparked outrage across the competitive hot dog world. Rival competitor Nick demanded, “We’re here to celebrate athletic eating, not advanced storage solutions,” while Harrison declared, “I’ve never seen a man treat his digestive system like it has two front doors.” Devin, visibly confused during an impromptu press conference, reportedly shouted, “If the weenie disappears but nobody saw chewing, is it even a hot dog, or is it just a disappearing magic trick?” before wandering off in search of mustard. Meanwhile, investigators reportedly recovered enough circumstantial evidence to suggest dozens upon dozens of weenies may have embarked on what insiders are calling “The Brown Line Express.” Tom has vehemently denied all wrongdoing, insisting, “Every weenie I logged was consumed according to… my interpretation of the rules.” The Weenie Wars Commission has not announced a ruling, but insiders say officials are considering the largest score adjustment in league history if the Epween Files prove authentic. Until then, Tom’s 24-weenie lead remains under the darkest cloud ever cast over competitive tube-meat athletics.. Nick was informed this had been submitted and asked whether the account was accurate. He said parts of it were. He was asked which parts. He said the parts that make him look okay. He was told those parts appear to be limited. He agreed, reluctantly.
tips_headlines.tip_raw: The Weenie Wars community was thrown into absolute chaos this morning after the anonymous release of the so-called “Epween Files,” a dossier alleging that current leader Tom, who sits atop the standings with 24 officially logged weenies, may have reached that total through methods the official rulebook describes as “deeply concerning and anatomically impossible.” Sources familiar with the investigation claim that as many as 85% of Tom’s recorded weenies never passed his lips at all, instead allegedly taking the “rear entrance express lane.” Officials confirmed that only weenies consumed orally are eligible to be logged, prompting an immediate review of Tom’s scorecard. Eyewitnesses reported seeing Tom “walking suspiciously stiff” after several meals, while one judge admitted, “At the time, we just thought he had bad posture. Looking back… there were signs.”  The allegations have sparked outrage across the competitive hot dog world. Rival competitor Nick demanded, “We’re here to celebrate athletic eating, not advanced storage solutions,” while Harrison declared, “I’ve never seen a man treat his digestive system like it has two front doors.” Devin, visibly confused during an impromptu press conference, reportedly shouted, “If the weenie disappears but nobody saw chewing, is it even a hot dog, or is it just a disappearing magic trick?” before wandering off in search of mustard. Meanwhile, investigators reportedly recovered enough circumstantial evidence to suggest dozens upon dozens of weenies may have embarked on what insiders are calling “The Brown Line Express.” Tom has vehemently denied all wrongdoing, insisting, “Every weenie I logged was consumed according to… my interpretation of the rules.” The Weenie Wars Commission has not announced a ruling, but insiders say officials are considering the largest score adjustment in league history if the Epween Files prove authentic. Until then, Tom’s 24-weenie lead remains under the darkest cloud ever cast over competitive tube-meat athletics.
tips_headlines.headline: 💩🌭 "The Brown Line Express" - Clubhouse Leader Tom Faces Explosive Keistering Allegations

tips_headlines.text: Tom and Jake were seen at the pride festival in West Hartford with a stroller filled with Fenway franks.. The item referenced above was identified by three Epween Files analysts independently and without coordination. All three reached the same conclusion. They shared their findings in a group message. The message contained no words. Just a single period. The period has been entered into the record.
tips_headlines.tip_raw: Tom and Jake were seen at the pride festival in West Hartford with a stroller filled with Fenway franks.
tips_headlines.headline: 🏳️‍🌈🌭 Sources: Fenway Franks Deployed in Stroller at Pride Parade — Jake Named Person of Interest

tips_headlines.text: The world has officially entered Chorizogate after Owen traveled all the way to Uruguay and began insisting that chorizo is “basically just a hot dog.” Legal scholars have been working around the clock to interpret the Weenie Accords, while Nick and Tom have issued a unanimous ruling that this is a flagrant violation of international hot dog law—unless, and only unless, the chorizo is consumed from a singular, lonely chair facing the corner of a bedroom, in which case it’s merely a misdemeanor. Harrison remains the lone dissenter, passionately arguing before the court that “chorizo is absolutely a weenie,” despite overwhelming public outrage. Meanwhile, Devin contributed absolutely nothing to the legal discussion by declaring, “If you rotate the sausage 37 degrees clockwise, it becomes a breakfast item and therefore falls under bird law.” The tribunal adjourned without a verdict, but Owen continues wandering the streets of Uruguay eating suspiciously spicy “hot dogs” while the Hague prepares an arrest warrant.. Nick maintains that what happened is explainable. He has had multiple opportunities to explain it. His explanations have, to date, made the file larger rather than smaller. This is not typically how explanations work.
tips_headlines.tip_raw: The world has officially entered Chorizogate after Owen traveled all the way to Uruguay and began insisting that chorizo is “basically just a hot dog.” Legal scholars have been working around the clock to interpret the Weenie Accords, while Nick and Tom have issued a unanimous ruling that this is a flagrant violation of international hot dog law—unless, and only unless, the chorizo is consumed from a singular, lonely chair facing the corner of a bedroom, in which case it’s merely a misdemeanor. Harrison remains the lone dissenter, passionately arguing before the court that “chorizo is absolutely a weenie,” despite overwhelming public outrage. Meanwhile, Devin contributed absolutely nothing to the legal discussion by declaring, “If you rotate the sausage 37 degrees clockwise, it becomes a breakfast item and therefore falls under bird law.” The tribunal adjourned without a verdict, but Owen continues wandering the streets of Uruguay eating suspiciously spicy “hot dogs” while the Hague prepares an arrest warrant.
tips_headlines.headline: 🌶️⚖️ Owen Insists Chorizo 'Basically a Hot Dog'; Hague Prepares Arrest Warrant

tips_headlines.text: An anonymous source has come forward claiming to have proof that Tom is living a double life, known in his other life as “Just the Tip Tommy”. This has been reported to the commission and logged in the Epween files.. The Commission forwarded this to the Epween Files archive. The archivist added it without comment, which colleagues noted was unusual — she normally has a comment. When pressed, she said only: this tracks. She was asked what it tracks. She said everything. She returned to the archive and closed the door.
tips_headlines.tip_raw: An anonymous source has come forward claiming to have proof that Tom is living a double life, known in his other life as “Just the Tip Tommy”. This has been reported to the commission and logged in the Epween files.
tips_headlines.headline: 🕵️🤫 Anonymous Source Alleges Tom Operating Under Alias 'Just the Tip Tommy'
